description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a bear, with a soft, velvety brown exterior and rounded ears. The bear has a white snout, black oval eyes, and a small black nose, giving it a gentle and neutral expression. Its paws and the inside of its ears are accented with a pale yellow color. The bear is holding a plush hamburger, which features a cute face, lettuce, cheese, and a bun, adding a playful touch. The stitching along the back and limbs is visible, indicating a well-constructed, cuddly design. The overall appearance is charming and inviting, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A soft brown bear plush toy with yellow accents, holding a cute plush hamburger. The toy has a gentle, neutral expression and visible stitching details.
description_view_0: The back of the bear is visible, showing rounded ears, a small tail, and a central seam running down the back.
description_view_1: The left side of the bear is shown, with one ear, arm, and leg visible, as well as a partial view of the plush hamburger.
description_view_2: The front of the bear is visible, displaying its face, yellow-accented paws, and the plush hamburger with a smiling face.
description_view_3: The right side of the bear is shown, highlighting the side of its face, ear, and the plush hamburger it is holding.
attribute_facial_expression: The bear has a neutral, gentle facial expression with wide black oval eyes and a small black nose. The mouth is a simple black line, giving it a calm and friendly appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms forward, holding a plush hamburger, and legs bent in a relaxed seated position.
